title: prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. multiflora
intro: Prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. multiflora is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. multiflora include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Prismatomeris tetrandra subsp. multiflora is often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
